title: The Asmongold Mythic Talent situation is Crazy
description:
Mythic Talent announced that Asmongold and them are parting ways. This follows news a few days prior regarding vtuber Grimmi. Lots of things happening in a short time frame surrounding Mythic, all becoming a very intriguing series of events.
